level.testConsent: This test banner isn't part of the real game: it only exists to validate the level contract (onWin / onLose / countdown) before the 12 real levels are built.

ranking.title: Ranking
ranking.empty: No records yet. Be the first!

info.title: Information
info.objective: The goal is simple: get every cookie category accepted across all 12 levels. The catch is the interface will do everything it can to stop you.
info.rules: Every level lasts 100 seconds and the counter never stops. The X in the corner closes the window and counts as a loss, in any level, at any time. Losing sends your run back to Level 1 — but your ranking record, saved under your username, is never erased.
info.controls: Everything works the same with a mouse or a finger: tap or click wherever you need to interact. Nothing else to learn.
